creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
On Sun, 22 Nov 2009 18:20:12 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/p5-ZML,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/140782 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/140782
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

This is good to commit.

This update I published this morning contains a rewrite of the parse
method which fixes wishes with meta variables and comments.
